description_long: This sconce features a rounded, opaque central body with two large, semi-transparent, wing-like panels extending symmetrically from its upper sides. The panels have a delicate, veined pattern reminiscent of insect wings, likely designed to diffuse light softly. At the base, two smaller, solid, oval-shaped elements are attached, possibly serving as decorative or structural supports. The overall form is organic and minimalist, with smooth transitions between the main body and the wing-like extensions. The color palette is a uniform light gray, giving it a modern and understated appearance. The fixture appears to be designed for wall mounting, with the wing panels acting as both light diffusers and decorative features.
description: A modern sconce with a rounded body and two large, veined, wing-like diffusers in light gray. Minimalist and organic in design, it features small oval supports at the base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical, veined wing-like panels and the rounded central body with two small ovals at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thinness and angle of the wing-like panels, with the rounded body and one oval support visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the rounded body and the symmetrical arrangement of the wing-like panels and base ovals.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the angled wing panel and the rounded body with the other oval support.
attribute_fixture_design: Minimalist and modern, with organic, wing-inspired diffusers and a smooth, rounded body. The design emphasizes simplicity and soft, diffused lighting.
